name: Stripe Atlas
summary: Stripe Atlas helps startups incorporate in Delaware and provides tools for banking, fundraising, and accepting payments.
benefits: Founder equity issuance and share purchase
Access to over $50,000 in partner discounts
eligibility: Partner or accelerator affiliation may be required.
